gt_provenance.details: Labels are not derived from model outputs, but many are proxy/stability/stress-test labels rather than official external ground truth.

score_normalization.details: No self-normalized prediction metrics found. Warning is observed-effect power fallback when external MDE/reference effect is absent.

result_existence.details: Main benchmark numbers match files. Stale paths and skipped feature-mismatch claims were repaired post-audit.

dead_code.details: Duplicated brain-wide multiverse and unused raw-effect helper were repaired post-audit; injected-null utility builders remain for future traps.

scope.details: Current hardened wave is 20 runnable fMRI claims over 8 fMRI cohorts; broad cross-disease claims require expansion/adjudication.

eval_type.details: No human_eval yet; no official benchmark ground truth for most fMRI claims.

post_audit_fixes: Demoted no-shared-feature claims in benchmark-ready builder
Reran hardened no-harmonization and ComBat benchmarks with n_skipped=0
Replaced benchmark-private brain-wide multiverse with shared confirm.multiverse.run_brainwide_multiverse
Wired generic agent brain-wide path to shared multiverse implementation
Fixed stale pilot paths and current-status text in experiment tracker
Added first-pass fMRI claim literature label ledger

claims.text: The benchmark-ready framework runs end-to-end and emits auditable receipts.
FCR reduction is measured against proxy/stress-test labels, not official disease-biomarker ground truth.
Broad cross-disease robustness requires literature labels and benchmark expansion.
